data.title: Elon Musk imagines Fort Knox empty as others pitch Strategic Bitcoin Reserve
data.description:
Musk has decided to believe that Fort Knox hasn't had its gold supply checked in decades, leading to speculation about a bitcoin reserve.
The post Elon Musk imagines Fort Knox empty as others pitch Strategic Bitcoin Reserve appeared first on Protos.
source: https://protos.com/elon-musk-imagines-fort-knox-empty-as-others-pitch-strategic-bitcoin-reserve/

data.title: The Silver To Bitcoin’s Gold: Why A Litecoin ETF Could Drive Price To $800
data.description:
Crypto analyst EXCAVO has alluded to the potential Litecoin ETFs and how they spark a massive price surge for LTC. The analyst also revealed how high LTC could rally to at the end of this bull cycle thanks to these ETFs.  How The Litecoin ETFs Could Drive LTC’s Price To $800 In a TradingView post, EXCAVO highlighted the Litecoin ETFs as one of the factors that could drive LTC’s price to $800...
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/news/litecoin/litecoin-price-to-800-with-etfs/

data.title: The acting head of the U.S. Social Security Administration has resigned after a dispute with DOGE
data.description:
US Social Security Administration (SSA) acting head Michelle King resigned after a dispute with DOGE over access to sensitive government records.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/head-us-social-security-resigned-doge/

data.title: Security platform Blockaid raises $50M in Series B funding
data.description:

data.title: SEC Receives Application For Bitwise Spot XRP ETF
data.description: According to BlockBeats, the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) has confirmed the receipt of an application for a Bitwise spot XRP Exchange-Traded Fund (ETF). This development was reported on February 19 by Cointelegraph.

data.title: BTC falls below 94,000 USDT
data.description: OKX market data shows that BTC fell below 94,000 USDT and is now at 93,993.3 USDT, a 24-hour drop of 1.53%. (This newsletter is generated with the assistance of AI)

data.title: Bitcoin(BTC) Drops Below 94,000 USDT with a 1.66% Decrease in 24 Hours
data.description: On Feb 18, 2025, 18:01 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Bitcoin has dropped below 94,000 USDT and is now trading at 93,855.21875 USDT, with a narrowed 1.66% decrease in 24 hours.

data.title: Bitcoin’s Bearish Pressure Rises as FTX Begins Repayments for Claims Below $50K
data.description:
The post Bitcoin’s Bearish Pressure Rises as FTX Begins Repayments for Claims Below $50K appeared first on Coinpedia Fintech News
As FTX begins its repayment process and injects liquidity into the market, there’s a downward pressure on the price chart. As a result, Bitcoin is having trouble building the buying momentum that analysts had anticipated would increase following FTX’s repayments....
source: https://coinpedia.org/news/bitcoins-bearish-pressure-rises-as-ftx-begins-repayments-for-claims-below-50k/

data.title: Bitcoin Drops Below $95K as Solana, XRP and Dogecoin Keep Falling
data.description:
Bitcoin has fallen to its lowest price in weeks as Solana continues to bleed amid the LIBRA controversy, plus other top coins dip.
source: https://decrypt.co/306545/bitcoin-below-95k-solana-xrp-dogecoin-falling
